articles.title: This Pune Restaurant Is Featured Among World's Most Beautiful Restaurants For 2026
articles.description: Rosso plays with the idea of southern Italy through an Indian lens

articles.title: 'Behind every shot that hit different': Makers unveil explosive BTS video of Yash's Toxic on Geetu Mohandas' birthday
articles.description: The makers of Toxic surprised fans with a special behind-the-scenes video celebrating director Geetu Mohandas' birthday. The footage offers a rare glimpse into the making of Yash's highly anticipated action drama and showcases the filmmaker leading the massive production with confidence.

articles.title: Jagapathi Babu Requests Not To 'Troll' Janhvi Kapoor Amid Peddi Backlash - Report
articles.description: Janhvi Kapoor has been facing major backlash for her Peddi portrayal. Not only her, but also director Buchi Babu Sana has also come under fire for allegedly 'objectifying' women in the film. Amid this, Jagapathi Babu reportedly defended Janhvi.

articles.title: ‘Was directing Aamir Khan and dating Miss Universe so to say’: Vikram Bhatt recalls broke days while dating Sushmita Sen
articles.description: Vikram Bhatt has opened up about a challenging phase about financial struggles whilst dating former Miss Universe and actor Sushmita Sen.

articles.title: His father was an IIT graduate; Shaurya Shikhar couldn't crack IIT-JEE – at 26, he surprised him with a ₹55 lakh BMW
articles.description: Ankur Warikoo's viral LinkedIn post highlights Shaurya Shikhar's journey from failing IIT-JEE and feeling inadequate to earning a seven-figure monthly income and gifting his father a ₹55 lakh BMW. The story emphasizes that life eventually works out, urging readers to keep moving forward through difficult times, a message resonating widely online.

articles.title: ‘Mandodari’ Kajal Aggarwal says Ranbir Kapoor, Yash's Ramayana is 'something India has never witnessed before'
articles.description: Kajal Aggarwal shared her experience playing the role of Ravana's wife in Nitesh Tiwari's mythological epic, Ramayana.

articles.title: Varun Dhawan makes big revelation; shares this actress was the original choice for Andhadhun with him
articles.description: The acclaimed thriller Andhadhun, starring Ayushmann Khurrana, almost had a different cast: Varun Dhawan and Kangana Ranaut were the original choices!

articles.title: 'Toy Story 5' Trailer Out Now: Not Woody or Buzz, THIS character is the true lead of Andrew Stanton's film
articles.description: Introduced in Toy Story 2 through one of the most emotionally devastating sequences in animated cinema, Jessie has always been the franchise's most layered character

articles.title: A.R. Rahman’s historic Attari Border concert honors BSF ahead of ‘Main Vaapas Aaunga’ release
articles.description: A.R. Rahman performs at Attari border for the first time, honoring BSF personnel and promoting Imtiaz Ali's film Main Vaapas Aaunga.

articles.title: Rashmika Mandanna In MS Subbulakshmi Biopic? All About ‘Queen Of Carnatic Music’
articles.description: According to reports, Rashmika Mandanna has given her look test for Gowtham Tinnanuri's MS Subbulakshmi biopic. Earlier, the film was taken to Sai Pallavi and Rukmini Vasanth. An official confirmation from the makers is due.

articles.title: Garena Free Fire MAX redeem codes 08 June 2026: Claim free diamonds, skins and exclusive rewards
articles.description: Garena Free Fire MAX redeem codes 08 June 2026: Claim free diamonds, skins and exclusive rewards

articles.title: Leonardo DiCaprio ignored John C. Reilly's advice to skip 'Titanic' and it changed his career forever
articles.description: John C. Reilly famously advised Leonardo DiCaprio against starring in 'Titanic', believing its predictable plot about a sinking ship wouldn't resonate. He urged DiCaprio to choose Paul Thomas Anderson's 'Boogie Nights' instead. DiCaprio, however, defied the advice, leading to 'Titanic's' monumental success and his global stardom, a decision he now acknowledges but never regrets.

articles.title: Knox Jolie-Pitt channels dad Brad Pitt's 'Fight Club' energy in Muay Thai match - WATCH
articles.description: Angelina Jolie's son, Knox, recently showcased impressive Muay Thai skills in a viral video, drawing comparisons to his father, Brad Pitt's 'Fight Club' persona. Attended by his mother and twin sister, the teen fighter entered the ring on his graduation day, even inviting classmates to witness his bout. Knox, largely private, has been dedicated to martial arts training.

articles.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai Day 3 Collection: Varun Dhawan Starrer Sees Strong Sunday Growth
articles.description: Varun Dhawan's Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai witnessed healthy growth on its first Sunday at the box office. The romantic comedy earned ₹9 crore on Day 3, taking its opening weekend total to ₹24 crore.

articles.title: 'Every child deserves this': Former NASA engineer Mark Rober spends $60 million on free science education for children
articles.description: Science News: Science classes are often remembered for textbooks, diagrams and memorising formulas. Mark Rober wants children to remember something different, namel.

articles.title: ‘Do I have haters?’: ‘Maa Inti Bangaaram’ star Samantha Ruth Prabhu gives a witty reply during Q&A session
articles.description: Samantha Ruth Prabhu, gearing up for 'Maa Inti Bangaaram,' playfully dismissed her haters during a fan Q&A. She also revealed Sai Pallavi was initially considered for the lead role before the project came to her. The film, where Samantha plays a dual role, is set for a June 19, 2026 release.

articles.title: Akshay Kumar Welcome To The Jungle Fees: Actor Charges Just Rs 1.8 Crore, Signs Deal For 72% IPR Stake
articles.description: Akshay Kumar has reportedly accepted a reduced upfront fee for Welcome to the Jungle, while the film has already recovered a large share of its investment through ancillary rights.

articles.title: Rashmika Mandanna to play MS Subbulakshmi in Gowtam Tinnanuri’s biopic after look test - Report
articles.description: Rashmika Mandanna is reportedly set to play legendary Carnatic singer MS Subbulakshmi in Gowtam Tinnanuri’s biopic, with a look test said to be done, though official confirmation is awaited.

articles.title: Bandar Box Office Day 3: Bobby Deol's Film Crosses Rs 1 Crore Mark But Struggles Overall
articles.description: Despite positive reviews and praise for Bobby Deol's performance, Anurag Kashyap's 'Bandar' is struggling at the box office. The film has earned just ₹2.45 crore in three days, raising concerns about its commercial prospects.

articles.title: 'Don't want to COMPROMISE': Shilpa on being selective with films
articles.description: Shilpa Shetty Kundra believes filmmaking has shifted, with producers favoring OTT over risky theatrical releases. She's now selective, seeking roles that justify her screen time and a big-screen experience for her children. Despite turning down major films, she has no regrets, prioritizing her artistic choices and personal satisfaction. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Jennifer Winget To Marry Boyfriend William Ishmael In Christian Ceremony? All We Know About Beyhadh Star's Wedding
articles.description: Jennifer Winget is set to marry Singapore-based businessman William Ishmael after reportedly accepting his holiday proposal. The couple is said to be planning a Christian wedding, with September-October or December-January dates under consideration.

articles.title: ‘Aakhri Vasant’ highlights loneliness among elderly
articles.description: ‘Aakhri Vasant’ highlights loneliness among elderly

articles.title: Kristen Welker Family, Husband, Kids and Net Worth: All About the NBC Host Trump Walked Out On
articles.description: NBC News journalist Kristen Welker has gone viral after President Trump abruptly ended his Meet the Press interview when she challenged his claims about rigged elections in California and told him that looking is not evidence.

articles.title: Folk festival celebrates Ganga-Jamuni culture
articles.description: Lucknow’s Traditional Folk Art Festival showcased Ganga-Jamuni culture with folk music, dance drama and regional acts at Mohan Singh Bisht Auditorium.

articles.title: Ankita Lokhande and Krystle Dsouza's share a special birthday wish for producer Ekta Kapoor: Krystle says 'Thanks for believing in me'
articles.description: On June 7, TV mogul Ektaa Kapoor welcomed another year of life, surrounded by warm wishes from her colleagues in the entertainment industry. Notably, Ankita Lokhande, who rose to fame through Kapoor's iconic series 'Pavitra Rishta,' took a moment to express her heartfelt gratitude, declaring Kapoor a transformative influence.

articles.title: Several documentaries on D4vd case reportedly in production as Celeste Rivas' family stays away
articles.description: Celeste Rivas' family has firmly declined all requests from production companies interested in creating documentaries about her alleged relationship with singer D4vd. Despite significant public interest and ongoing legal proceedings against the artist, the family, represented by attorney Patrick Steinfeld, wishes to remain out of the spotlight and will not provide any input for these projects.

articles.title: Ajay Devgn's sweet birthday wish for sister Neelam is all about bonds
articles.description: Ajay Devgn posted a heartfelt birthday message for his sister, Neelam Devgan, sharing a throwback photo. The actor is also busy on the professional front with major sequels like 'Dhamaal 4', 'Golmaal 5', and 'Drishyam 3' in the pipeline.

articles.title: New OTT releases this week (June 8 - June 14): Bhooth Bangla to Raakh to Karuppu, 10 new movies and shows on Netflix, JioHotstar, Prime Video and more
articles.description: This week brings a wave of new content to streaming platforms. Suriya's action drama Karuppu and Akshay Kumar's horror-comedy Bhooth Bangla are set to release. Crime thriller Raakh and reality show Maa Hai Na will also premiere. Romance drama Every Year After and Malayalam thriller Dridam are coming. Read on to know when and where to watch them online.

articles.title: Christian Eriksen wife and children: All about Sabrina Kvist Jensen and their family
articles.description: Christian Eriksen's long-time partner is Sabrina Kvist Jensen. The couple has reportedly been together since around 2012 and share two children.

articles.title: Who is Kvrtez? Everything to know about Twitch streamer Kathelina amid cheating allegations from ex-boyfriend Imnotkenneth
articles.description: Twitch streamer Kathelina, known online as Kvrtez, is facing online attention after YouTuber Imnotkenneth accused her of cheating on him with a blood cousin. The allegations were made in a June 5, 2026 YouTube video. Kenneth described how he allegedly discovered the situation, while Kathelina has not publicly responded. The claims remain unverified and are currently allegations.

articles.title: Michael becomes Lionsgate’s highest-grossing film ever with over $854 Million worldwide collection
articles.description: The Michael Jackson biopic Michael continues its extraordinary box office run, earning over $854 million worldwide and positioning itself to become Lionsgate's highest-grossing film ever.

articles.title: How farming made Salim Kumar a ‘billionaire’ and earned even Mammootty’s praise
articles.description: Legendary actor Salim Kumar didn't just love farming; he lived it. Discover his deeply moving philosophy on agriculture, his push for Pokkali cultivation, and how the soil kept him energetic.

articles.title: Sunny Deol shares adorable pic of mom Prakash Kaur kissing Bobby Deol
articles.description: Sunny Deol praised his brother Bobby Deol's performance in 'Bandar' by sharing a heartwarming picture of their mother Prakash Kaur kissing Bobby. Esha Deol also lauded her brother, calling him 'undoubtedly the finest actor today'.

articles.title: Sahiba Bali's dream: Interviewing 'Delhi boy' Virat Kohli for show
articles.description: Sports presenter Sahiba Bali expressed her wish to interview Virat Kohli for her YouTube series 'Journey to Jersey' before he retires, calling him a 'proper Delhi boy' with a lot of aura. Her series features cricketers and their families.

articles.title: PM Narendra Modi mourns the death of National Award-winning actor Salim Kumar: ‘He made a mark with his versatility’
articles.description: Salim Kumar, who passed away last night, was laid to rest in the compound of his home. He was cremated with full state honours on June 7.

articles.title: The hands that hurt, the voices that heal: Shivamogga Central Jail inmates present songs on Bhadravathi Akashavani
articles.description: Inmates at Shivamogga Central Jail share their musical talents on Bhadravathi Akashavani, promoting healing and rehabilitation through song.

articles.title: National Award-Winning Actor Salim Kumar Cremated With State Honours
articles.description: Salim Kumar died on Saturday night at the age of 56.

articles.title: Sunny Deol praises brother Bobby Deol for 'Bandar,' shares emotional family pic
AR Rahman performs at Attari border in tribute to BSF ahead of 'Main Vaapas Aaunga' release
articles.description: Oscar-winning composer A R Rahman on Sunday delivered his first-ever live performance at the Attari border post in Punjab where he paid a musical tribute to the Border Security Force.

articles.title: Panchayat 5: Faisal Malik Shares Major Update, Reveals Shoot Will Wrap Up Soon; ‘Kahaani Mazedaar Hai’
articles.description: Faisal Malik shared an exciting update about Panchayat season 5, and revealed that only a small portion of the shoot is left.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by George Harrison: ‘You've got as many lives as you like, and more, even ones...’ Master musician's wisdom on life and evolution
articles.description: George Harrison, the influential guitarist of The Beatles, believed life offers numerous "lives" beyond a single, fixed journey. His quote reflects his interest in spirituality and continuous personal transformation, suggesting that individuals navigate multiple roles, challenges, and circumstances. This perspective encourages acceptance of inevitable change and embraces life as a journey of reinvention and discovery.

articles.title: Bigg Boss Kannada 13 opens auditions for commoners; Early launch announced
articles.description: Bigg Boss Kannada Season 13 is set to welcome commoners, offering ordinary individuals a chance to enter the famous house. Aspiring contestants can apply by submitting a three-minute video audition detailing why they deserve a spot. This move follows the successful inclusion of non-celebrities in Season 5, which saw salesman Divakar become a popular runner-up.

articles.title: Janhvi Kapoor's Peddi Row: Anu Aggarwal Recalls Rejecting Bollywood's 'Norm' Of Women's Objectification
articles.description: Amid the backlash surrounding Janhvi Kapoor's Peddi, Aashiqui star Anu Aggarwal shared a powerful message about actors' responsibility in shaping cinema. Reflecting on her own career choices, she urged young performers to reject roles that objectify women.

articles.title: 'Jo bhi maine kiya hai, aap inka naam lijiye': Janhvi Kapoor's video of calling Buchi Babu Sana most 'rowdy' director in India goes viral amid Peddi massive backlash
articles.description: Janhvi Kapoor's character in Ram Charan's film Peddi faces online criticism. An old video of the actress praising director Buchi Babu Sana has resurfaced. Viewers argue her character lacks agency and serves only as a romantic interest. The director has acknowledged the feedback and plans to make changes. The film stars Ram Charan and Janhvi Kapoor.

articles.title: Varun praises Salman Khan for keeping it real
articles.description: Varun Dhawan opened up about the loneliness that comes with fame, saying most actors struggle with it despite their glamorous image. He credited Salman Khan's unfiltered late-night Instagram posts as an example of authenticity, adding that staying true to yourself is essential, otherwise you won't realise what you've become.

articles.title: Elton John Serenades Dua Lipa And Callum Turner At Their Star-Studded Italian Wedding
articles.description: Sir Elton John sings Your Song at Dua Lipa and Callum Turner wedding in Italy, with DJs Carl Cox, Martin Garrix, David Guetta and Peggy Gou also performing.

articles.title: 'You Gave Me A Life I Could Only Dream Of': Abhay Verma Celebrates Two Years Of Munjya, Shares BTS Pics
articles.description: Released in 2024, Munjya emerged as one of the biggest success stories of the year.

articles.title: James Handy’s last project dropped from production
articles.description: Actor James Handy's final project, a comedy skit titled 'Kickstart, V,' has been cancelled following his tragic murder. The film's writer and producer confirmed the decision, citing respect for the actor. Handy was reportedly stabbed multiple times, and his girlfriend's son has been arrested and charged with his murder.

articles.title: Janhvi Kapoor's Makeup Artist Backs Her Amid Peddi Row: "It Is Easy To Blame The Actress"
articles.description: Janhvi Kapoor has found herself at the centre of a debate over the portrayal of her character in Peddi.

articles.title: Callum Turner and Dua Lipa’s Sicily wedding: Inside the 3-day event with 300 guests, $1.73 million budget and more
articles.description: Pop sensation Dua Lipa and actor Callum Turner celebrated their union with a lavish three-day wedding in Sicily, Italy, following a private London registry office ceremony. The star-studded event, attended by 300 guests, featured a performance by Elton John and a menu curated by Michelin-star chef Tony Lo Coco, making it a truly unforgettable celebration.
